title: German Hazelnut Crunchy Fritters
description: A sweet and crunchy dessert inspired by German cuisine, featuring hazelnuts and fritters.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, and salt.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, and melted butter.
3. Add the chopped hazelnuts to the dry ingredients and stir to combine.
4. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until a dough forms.
5. Fold in the crushed crunchy cereal and vanilla extract.
6. Heat about 2-3 inches of vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
7. Using a cookie scoop or spoon, drop the dough into the hot oil, making sure not to overcrowd the pan.
8. Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
9. Using a slotted spoon, remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
10. Serve the fritters warm, dust with powdered sugar if desired.
